welcome_message:
Welcome to the default ucm template.

This template scaffolds a minimal ucm.yml with a single catalog, a single schema, and one grant so you have a known-good starting shape to extend.

project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Name must consist of letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
project_name.description:
Unique name for this ucm project.
project_name

schema_name.description:
Initial schema inside the catalog.
schema_name

principal.description:
Group or service principal receiving read access to the catalog.
principal

success_message:
Your new ucm project has been created in the '{{.project_name}}' directory.

Next steps:
  cd {{.project_name}}
  databricks ucm validate
  databricks ucm plan
  databricks ucm deploy
